title: TrustForge Federation Attestation
description: Cross-trust-domain attestation: domain A signs a statement asserting that domain B's identity (or a specific actor in B) is recognized within A's trust fabric, optionally bounded by capability scope and time. Used by SPIFFE federated trust bundles, business-partner trust links, and sovereignty federations (TF-0002 "federated" identity mode).

attestation_id.description: Stable identifier for this attestation; used for revocation lookups.

subject_actor.description: Optional specific actor inside subject_domain. When omitted the attestation covers the whole domain.

scope.description: Optional list of action names this attestation permits cross-domain. Empty means "recognize identity only" (no implicit authority).

trust_levels_granted.description: Maximum TrustLevel the issuer is willing to extend to subjects under this attestation.

trust_bundle.description: SPIFFE-style trust bundle: the public keys / certificates of subject_domain that issuer_domain accepts. Each entry is either an X.509 PEM, a SPIFFE JWT-SVID JWK, or an opaque ed25519 public key.

value.description: Encoded key material (PEM string, base64 JWK JSON, or base64 raw public key).

key_id.description: Optional stable key identifier within the bundle.

constraints.description: Optional constraints attached to the federation grant (rate limits, target globs, time windows).

issuer.description: Authority within issuer_domain that signed this attestation.
